name: pricing
label: Video Generation Plans
title: Seedance AI Video Generation Plans
description: Choose your AI video generation plan and start creating professional videos

faq.name: faq
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about our pricing and plans

items.title: What are credits and how do they work?
items.description: Credits are used for all AI generations. For example, an 8s 1080p Veo3 video costs 8 credits, and a 1K Nano Banana Pro image costs 3 credits. With the 400 credits in the Mini plan, you can create about 50 Veo3 videos or 133 images per month.

items.title: What happens to unused credits at the end of the month?
items.description: Monthly credits do not roll over to the next month. We recommend using your credits within your billing cycle. For yearly plans, credits are granted monthly throughout the year and do not roll over.

items.title: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan anytime?
items.description: Yes! You can upgrade your plan at any time and the changes will take effect immediately. When downgrading, the change will take effect at the start of your next billing cycle. Any unused credits from your current plan will be available until the end of your current billing period.

items.title: What payment methods do you accept?
items.description: We accept all major credit and debit cards through our secure payment processor. For users in specific regions, we also support local payment methods including SberPay, YooMoney, and Mir Card for Russian users.

items.title: Is there a free trial available?
items.description: New users receive 10 free credits upon registration to test our video generation capabilities. This allows you to create 1 video and experience the quality of our AI models before subscribing.

items.title: What's the difference between monthly and yearly billing?
items.description: Yearly billing offers a 40% discount compared to monthly billing. With yearly plans, you pay upfront for the entire year and receive credits monthly throughout the year. Monthly plans are billed every month with credits refreshing at each billing cycle.

items.title: Can I use the generated videos commercially?
items.description: Yes! All our plans include full commercial usage rights for the videos you generate. You own the content you create and can use it for any purpose, including commercial projects, social media, marketing, and more.

items.title: What video quality and resolution do I get?
items.description: All plans include 1080p HD resolution output, ensuring professional-quality videos suitable for any platform. We use top-tier AI models to generate high-quality, realistic videos that meet professional standards.

items.title: How long does video generation take?
items.description: Video generation typically takes 2-5 minutes depending on the complexity and current queue. Standard and Plus plans include fast generation queue priority, which can reduce wait times during peak usage.

items.title: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
items.description: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time from your account settings. Your subscription will remain active until the end of your current billing period, and you'll retain access to your credits until then.
